results.question: What is the coordinates location of the circuits for Australian grand prix?
attempts:
SELECT c.lat, c.lng
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
WHERE r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT DISTINCT c.lat, c.lng
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
WHERE r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

results.question: List down Ajax's superpowers.
attempts:
SELECT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.superhero_name = 'Ajax';

results.question: List the top five schools, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the most number of Enrollment (Ages 5-17). Please give their NCES school identification number.
attempts:
SELECT s.NCESSchool
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
ORDER BY f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

results.question: What is the average number of crimes committed in 1995 in regions where the number exceeds 4000 and the region has accounts that are opened starting from the year 1997?
attempts:
SELECT AVG(d.A14) AS average_crimes
FROM district d
WHERE d.A14 > 4000
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM account a
    WHERE a.district_id = d.district_id
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) >= '1997'
  );

SELECT AVG(d.A14) AS average_crimes
FROM district d
WHERE d.A14 > 4000
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM account a
    WHERE a.district_id = d.district_id
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) >= '1997'
  );

SELECT AVG(d.A14) AS average_crimes
FROM district d
WHERE d.A14 > 4000
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM account a
    WHERE a.district_id = d.district_id
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) >= '1997'
  );

results.question: How many male clients in 'Hl.m. Praha' district?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'm' AND d.A2 = 'Hl.m. Praha';

results.question: What is the average fastest lap time in seconds for Lewis Hamilton in all the Formula_1 races?
attempts:
SELECT AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 1, 2) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 4, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 7, 2) AS REAL) + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 10, 3) AS REAL) / 1000) AS average_fastest_lap_seconds
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 1, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 4, 2) AS REAL) + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 7, 2) AS REAL) / 60 + 
                 CAST(SUBSTR(fastestLapTime, 10, 3) AS REAL) / 1000) AS average_fastest_lap_seconds
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL;

results.question: From race no. 50 to 100, how many finishers have been disqualified?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results 
WHERE raceId BETWEEN 50 AND 100 
  AND statusId = (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status = 'Disqualified'
  );

results.question: Calculate the difference of the total amount spent in all events by the Student_Club in year 2019 and 2020.
attempts:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.spent), 0) 
   FROM budget b 
   JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2020') -
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.spent), 0) 
   FROM budget b 
   JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
   WHERE strftime('%Y', e.event_date) = '2019') AS difference;

results.question: What is the complete address of the school with the lowest excellence rate? Indicate the Street, City, Zip and State.
attempts:
SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
ORDER BY ss.NumGE1500 / ss.enroll12 ASC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: Calculate the percentage of carcinogenic molecules which contain the Chlorine element.
attempts:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' AND a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 END)) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'carcinogenic';

results.question: How many users received commentator badges in 2014?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.UserId)
FROM badges b
WHERE b.Name = 'Commentator'
  AND strftime('%Y', b.Date) = '2014';

results.question: Among the patients with a normal Ig G level, how many of them have symptoms?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE e."aCL IgG" <= 20 AND e."Symptoms" IS NOT NULL;

results.question: How many superheroes have the super power of "Super Strength"?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower p ON hp.power_id = p.id
WHERE p.power_name = 'Super Strength';

results.question: Please list the name of the cards in the set Coldsnap with the highest converted mana cost.
attempts:
SELECT c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap'
ORDER BY c.convertedManaCost DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: For all patients with normal uric acid (UA), what is the average UA index based on their latest laboratory examination result?
attempts:
SELECT AVG(l."UA") AS average_UA
FROM "Laboratory" l
JOIN "Patient" p ON l."ID" = p."ID"
WHERE l."UA" BETWEEN 3.0 AND 7.0
  AND l."Date" = (
    SELECT MAX(l2."Date")
    FROM "Laboratory" l2
    WHERE l2."ID" = l."ID"
  );

results.question: User No.23853 gave a comment to a post at 9:08:18 on 2013/7/12, was that post well-finished?
attempts:
SELECT p.Title, p.CommunityOwnedDate, p.ClosedDate
FROM posts p
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE c.UserId = 23853
  AND c.CreationDate = '2013-07-12 09:08:18';

results.question: How many members of Business have the Medium size of tee shirt?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.major_name = 'Business' 
  AND m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium';

results.question: What is the type of the card "Ancestor's Chosen" as originally printed?
attempts:
SELECT DISTINCT originalType 
FROM cards 
WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
AND originalType IS NOT NULL;

results.question: Which active district has the highest average score in Reading?
attempts:
SELECT s.District
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active'
ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: Please provide the IDs of the 3 female clients with the largest loans.
attempts:
SELECT c.client_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY l.amount DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: Among all the lap records set on various circuits, what is the time for the fastest one?
attempts:
SELECT MIN(milliseconds) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM lapTimes;

results.question: In superheroes with missing weight data, calculate the difference between the number of superheroes with blue eyes and no eye color.
attempts:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.eye_colour_id = (SELECT id FROM colour WHERE colour = 'Blue') THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN s.eye_colour_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero s
WHERE s.weight_kg IS NULL;

results.question: In the College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences, how many majors are under the department of School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education?
attempts:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM major 
WHERE college = 'College of Agriculture and Applied Sciences' 
  AND department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education';

results.question: Mention the display name and location of the user who owned the excerpt post with hypothesis-testing tag.
attempts:
SELECT u.DisplayName, u.Location
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN tags t ON p.Id = t.ExcerptPostId
WHERE t.TagName = 'hypothesis-testing';

results.question: List all patients who were followed up at the outpatient clinic who underwent a laboratory test in October 1991 and had a total blood bilirubin level within the normal range.
attempts:
SELECT DISTINCT p.*
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Admission = 'outpatient clinic'
  AND l.Date BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-31'
  AND l."T-BIL" BETWEEN 0.2 AND 1.2;

results.question: Among the molecules with element Calcium, are they mostly carcinogenic or non carcinogenic?
attempts:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS carcinogenic_status,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Calcium'
GROUP BY carcinogenic_status
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS carcinogenic_status,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Calcium'
GROUP BY carcinogenic_status
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'carcinogenic'
        ELSE 'non carcinogenic'
    END AS carcinogenic_status,
    COUNT(*) AS count
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Calcium'
GROUP BY carcinogenic_status
ORDER BY count DESC;

results.question: Please list the full names of the students in the Student_Club that come from the Art and Design Department.
attempts:
SELECT DISTINCT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE maj.department = 'Art and Design';

results.question: List all the mythic rarity print cards banned in gladiator format.
attempts:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic'
  AND l.format = 'gladiator'
  AND l.status = 'banned';

results.question: Among posts by Harvey Motulsky and Noah Snyder, which one has higher popularity?
attempts:
SELECT p.Title, p.Score, p.ViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
ORDER BY p.Score DESC, p.ViewCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Title, p.Score, p.ViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
  AND p.Title IS NOT NULL
  AND p.ViewCount IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.Score DESC, p.ViewCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: Mention the reputation of users who had obtained the badge on 7/19/2010 7:39:08 PM.
attempts:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Reputation
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE b.Date = '2010-07-19 19:39:08';
